title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 6 - Generating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science course taught by David J. Malan, with Chapter 6 focusing on generative AI. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with accompanying community forums across social media and collaboration platforms.
writeup: This live, unedited chapter from CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, taught by Brian Yu, covers Chapter 6 on generative AI techniques. CS50 is Harvard's foundational computer science course spanning intellectual enterprises and programming fundamentals, and the chapter situates generative AI and AI coding within that broader curriculum. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School.
